entries.title: After 20 days - still no ring
entries.text:
I ordered an Ultrahuman Ring with high expectations based on the product's reputation and features. Unfortunately, my experience with the company was so poor that I canceled the order before ever using the product.

The issue was not the ring itself, it was the complete lack of communication and customer service throughout the entire process.

After placing my order, I waited for more than 20 days without receiving meaningful updates. During that time:

• I received no proactive communication regarding delays.
• I was not provided with tracking information.
• I had to repeatedly contact support myself to find out what was happening with my order.
• At no point did anyone apologize for the inconvenience, acknowledge the delay, or take ownership of the situation.

As the days passed without updates, my confidence in the company steadily declined. By the time I requested cancellation and a refund, I had already decided that I no longer wanted to do business with a company that communicated so poorly with its customers.

What made the situation even more frustrating was the timing. After I sent a message demanding cancellation and an immediate refund, the package suddenly appeared at my doorstep, and only then did I receive a response asking me to confirm delivery.

To me, this felt entirely reactive. If the order was ready to ship, there was no reason I should have been left in the dark for weeks without tracking information or status updates.

I cannot comment on the quality of the ring because I never used it. However, I can comment on the customer experience, and it was one of the worst online purchasing experiences I have had.

The problems did not end there. Even after deciding to cancel, I had to follow up multiple times regarding the refund process. Throughout the entire experience—from order placement, to shipping delays, to cancellation, to refund, I was consistently the one chasing information. The company never once demonstrated proactive communication or a genuine concern for the customer experience.

Delays happen. Supply issues happen. What customers expect is transparency, communication, and accountability. In my case, there was none.

Based on my experience, I would not recommend purchasing from Ultrahuman.
entries.reply: Hey! We hear you and we’re here to help. Could you please reach out to us directly at ultrahuman-care@ultrahuman.com and share your Ticket ID: 77726019? This will help our team locate your case quickly and work on a resolution at the earliest.

entries.title: I had the worst experience with… my ring air
entries.text:
I had the worst experience with Ultrahuman and the Ring AIR.
About a month after purchasing the ring, the battery life became terrible. After running diagnostics, Ultrahuman confirmed the ring was defective and sent a replacement. I then waited nearly 3 weeks for the new ring to arrive.
Unfortunately, the replacement ring also failed after about a month. On June 6, it stopped connecting during a yoga class and has not worked since.
Since then, I have been emailing customer support for weeks with little to no progress. entries.title: Probably spent 12+ hours overtime trying to get help for my broken ring😒.
entries.text: The app is good and I love the ring itself, but after about 4 months of use, It died one day and was never able to reconnect again. I went through all of the troubleshooting issues but nothing worked. Prior to my experience today, I have had 3 phone calls, sent about 6 emails (only 2 got a response), and spoke with support for HOURSS on end until i eventually gave up because I am a nursing student who doesn’t have a lot of time to waste. Plus the replies are repative when Ive given CLEAR information. Today I finally had a free day and wanted to get this expensive ring actually working or replaced, so I took the time necessary to deal with support. I waited 40 minutes to even get connected and an additional 3 hours of conversing, with about 10-30 minutes between replies. My ring was a gift bought for me and I am not longer in contact with the person. They said they needed an invoice which I understand, but people I’ve spoke with before were able to confirm that the ring was purchased by the barcodes on the box, so I truly did NOT understand the fuss. At about hour 2 they said they could replace it, and proceeded to say 30 minutes later the still need the invoice. They then sent me my ex’s information as the address to send to, so they obviously had the purchase history? Very confused about that, but it’s whatever.  Eventually it did end up working out and I am getting a new ring delivered, so I am very very grateful my time wasn’t ENTIRELY wasted. I don’t want to come off as nasty but this was SO frustrating, but I am really happy they worked with me to get this figured out. The 2 stars is due to the absolute headache and waste of time this ring and customer service has caused me. For a device of this price it should not have so many issues, especially as I read these reviews. Time will tell if the ring actually gets delivered to me. This experience has made me wish I chose the OURA ring instead. I am also fearful because my warranty is up in july, so what happens when this ring eventually fails on me too?😒
entries.reply:
Hi there, 

Thank you for reaching out and sharing your feedback. We completely understand that this was not the experience we intended for you, and we truly appreciate you bringing this to our attention.

entries.title: I originally purchased the ring through…
entries.text:
I originally purchased the ring through Kickstarter and have generally been satisfied with its functionality.

The Ultrahuman Air is the only smart ring I’ve owned, so I don’t have much basis for comparison. However, I have been disappointed with the battery quality.

I backed the product in late 2023 and have since received two replacement rings. Unfortunately, all of them have experienced significant battery degradation in less than a year. The most recent replacement, which I received in August 2025 (less than 7 months ago), is now showing the same issues. Even in power-saving mode, the battery lasts less than 2.5 days. 

The product works well as long as you maintain their subscription that covers defects (Ultrahuman X). Unfortunately, I ran into issues when renewing my subscription and exceeded the 30-day renewal window before completing it.

While Ultrahuman support has been kind enough to initiate a refund process, I don’t understand why it was still possible to purchase the subscription after the eligibility window had already passed.

I would like to think that I have simply been unlucky, but with the same issue across three different rings I doubt that is the case.
entries.reply:
Hey there! We have noted your feedback regarding the battery performance across your devices and the subscription renewal process. Rest assured, we will definitely highlight these points to our product team for further review.

If there are any other issues we can assist you with, please reach out to us at ultrahuman-care@ultrahuman.com and we will take it up right away.

entries.title: Sour and Traumatic sale and customer support.
entries.text:
Brought exactly, copy pasted from their order confirmation:
Ultrahuman Ring AIR-Matte Grey-0 x 1, Ultrahuman Ring AIR -Brushed Rose-0 x 1, Ultrahuman Bling - Stacking Ring Duo - Eternity Gold - Size 00 x 1, 2 year UHX subscription plan x 2, Ring AIR Sizing Kit x 2
These rings were for me and my wife to help us with our health journey after our baby boy's birth 8 months ago. Twenty-four hours after the order, I got an email saying that the sizing kit for my ring had been shipped. The next morning, I contacted the support team asking about my other half's sizing kit. I was told to wait and that it would be sent soon; if not, to contact them in 24 hours. After 24 hours, I contacted them and was talking with Abhimanyu, who was very nice and said that it might very well be that only one sizing kit was sent for both of us. I asked, in that case, how I was supposed to record her size, as the dispatch of the sizing kit activates the size menu on their site, which is not activated for her. He asked me to call them back to let them know of the size. I did mention during this and the previous conversation that I felt that something was not right and I was getting the hunch that something was wrong. He assured me that everything would be fine and he'd call me back after 30 minutes to let me know what was happening with the sizing ring issue.

He called after an hour and 20 minutes to say that we should have been sent two sizing kits, but for some reason, the operational service in the UK had sent only one, and that he had escalated it and he'd call back within 24 hours to inform me why the sizing kit hadn't been sent. In the meantime, he asked me to continue as discussed before.

Thirty-six hours passed by without any contact, and it turns out that my wife and I have the same ring sizes: 7 on index and ring fingers, and 8 on middle fingers. And there were small discrepancies in sizes between the left and right hand. Having only one size ring was proving difficult, and hence I decided to call and ask what was happening with the sizing kit and if there was any follow-up.

This time it was Lakshmi on the phone, who informed me that Abhimanyu had recorded in his notes that the issue was resolved and we were going to sort it out with one sizing kit. When I tried to explain to her that we never agreed that there should be only one sizing kit, and that he had even said that he was going to call me in 24 hours as to why the second sizing kit was never dispatched, she rudely and abruptly stopped me, saying that there was never a second sizing kit, as it was only one order. I was baffled and startled at this point, as I always believed it was two rings in one order and both the rings were given separate order numbers. When I challenged her with this information with the order numbers, she said that I didn't understand and it was only one order. At this point, I lost all faith in their sales process and their customer service. If this is just the beginning of the process of sizing the rings and there are so many issues, if there are some problems with the rings, be it battery life or connectivity, how are they going to handle it?

I just asked her to cancel the order, and then again there were glitches, as she canceled only a part of the order and needed a senior who had to cancel the other part, which was the subscription. Their whole process is in shambles. I managed to get my order canceled after being on the phone for over 40 minutes. 

Bottom line, they have a vision and marketing hype, but they still don't have the ethics and customer service.

And on top of it, as I'm writing this review, I get a message from Athik who wants to help me choose a product, and I had requested support 5 days ago to help me choose between air or a diesel ring.

It's made the whole experience sour and traumatic, especially for two healthcare workers who are trying to get into healthy living after their child's birth.
entries.reply: Hey there! We truly understand your perspective and where you are coming from, this experience is certainly not what we aim for. We would like to look into this for you right away, could you please reach out to us at ultrahuman-care@ultrahuman.com? We will prioritize checking the details of your interaction to ensure this is addressed properly.

entries.title: Poor workout tracking, repeated ring disconnection issues and disappointing support
entries.text:
I purchased the Ultrahuman Ring expecting a premium health and fitness tracking experience, but unfortunately I have had ongoing issues with the ring not recording workouts properly.
During workouts, the ring frequently disconnects from the app. I have seen messages such as “Ring is disconnected. Data is being collected by the Ring and will sync at the end of your workout.” However, the workout data then does not process correctly. I later receive errors such as “Something went wrong while processing your data” or “Workout summary will be available once your ring connects and data syncs.”
This has not happened once. It has happened repeatedly.
I have attached screenshots showing the disconnection messages, failed processing messages, missing workout summaries and sync problems. The issue is especially frustrating because I have already had problems with the ring before, to the point where a replacement ring had to be sent to me. Despite this, I am still experiencing faults with one of the key features I bought the ring for.
The support experience has also been disappointing. I initially tried to report the problem through the app but was dealing with a bot, with no proper way to upload screenshots or explain the issue fully. I was told the issue had been escalated, but when I followed up, I was told the complaint had already been logged and there was nothing further I could do.
After formally raising the issue by email, it took over 72 hours to receive a response. The reply I received simply asked me to check whether I had the latest version of the app and to monitor the ring again. Given the recurring nature of the issue, the screenshots provided, and the fact that I have already had a replacement ring, this response felt generic and inadequate.
For a premium product, I expected better reliability and better customer support. At the moment, I do not feel confident that the ring is accurately recording my workouts, and I do not feel the issue is being handled with the urgency or seriousness it deserves.
I would like Ultrahuman to provide a clear resolution, whether that is proper technical troubleshooting with a human support agent, a confirmed firmware or app fix, or a refund/replacement if the device is faulty.
entries.reply: Hey Annette, this is certainly not the experience we want our users to have. We are reviewing this and will be reaching out to you.

entries.title: Fantastic product
entries.text:
I purchased my Ultrahuman Ring in September 2024 and it has been working perfectly from day one. This is genuinely a great product that has made a real, positive difference in how I track my health, sleep, activity, and overall wellbeing.
The support team has been excellent every single time I've needed help (which hasn't been often). Responses are always fast, friendly, and very competent.
Recently I started experiencing some battery drain issues. The support agent guided me step-by-step through checking the stats, doing a restart, and running diagnostics — super easy and clearly explained. The app itself is very user-friendly, intuitive, and — best of all — completely free.
When the battery problem continued after troubleshooting, I contacted support again about a week ago. They quickly arranged a replacement, and I received a brand-new ring delivered to Norway in just few days. Keep in mind Norway is not a prioritized/priority shipping country for many brands, so this speed and care really impressed me.
The build quality of the ring is premium, it looks good, feels comfortable, and delivers accurate and useful health insights every day.
100% recommended product and company. I'm already looking forward to ordering the Ultrahuman Ring Pro when it becomes available in my country.
Thank you Ultrahuman team — keep up the fantastic work!

entries.title: Absolutely shambles
entries.text:
I ordered my ring in August 2025 and also paid for the two-year insurance policy. Since then, I have received three replacement rings and am now in need of a fourth replacement. Having to replace the same product four times in less than ten months is completely unacceptable and demonstrates a serious lack of reliability.

As a result, I requested a full refund for the ring, the insurance policy, and the additional power plug I purchased, as I no longer have confidence in either the product or the service provided. 

I first contacted your team over two weeks ago regarding this refund request. Despite your stated four-day response timeframe, I am still waiting for this matter to be resolved. I have already provided and confirmed my bank details, yet I was subsequently asked to verify them again. I had checked these details carefully before submitting them initially, so this unnecessary repetition has only caused further delays and frustration.

At this stage, I expect this matter to be treated as a priority. Please process the full refund without any further delay and provide written confirmation that this has been actioned. If there are any genuine issues preventing the refund from being completed, I expect a clear explanation and a realistic timeframe for resolution.

Ticket reference: TC-32790

The prolonged lack of communication and repeated delays have been extremely disappointing. I would appreciate immediate attention to this matter and a prompt response confirming that my refund is being processed.

Honestly, don’t even bother with Ultrahuman and go for an Oura..
entries.reply: Hey! We are here to help. We have reached out to you via email and requested a few details. Could you please share the requested information at the earliest? Once we receive the details, we will be able to review and process your request further.

entries.title: After more than a year using…
entries.text:
After more than a year using Ultrahuman￼ rings, I can honestly say I’ve always been impressed by the excellence, the level of detail in the app, and the quality of the information they provide.

Every single time I had any issue or question, their support team was absolutely excellent with me. I’m truly a loyal fan of the brand. I really appreciate their support, professionalism, kindness, and the fact that you are speaking with real people, not robots. I always felt supported and never abandoned in any situation I faced with them.

I’ve already placed the pre-order for my new ring, and I definitely recommend them.

Another thing I genuinely appreciate is that many of their plugins and advanced insights are included for free, unlike other brands that charge extra for data and features that Ultrahuman already delivers at an exceptionally professional level inside the app.

Unfortunately, I believe many of the one-star reviews come from frustration during isolated situations. But from my personal experience, the support Ultrahuman provided me was not something rare or accidental , it reflects the way they genuinely choose to deal with customers and problems. I can not wait to get my new ring, so COOL!
entries.reply:
Hey there! This honestly made our day, thank you so much for taking the time to share this! Reviews like yours remind us why we do what we do. 

We are so glad you have felt genuinely supported throughout and we cannot wait for you to get your new ring. You are going to love it!
